rationale: Snapshot of the gateway trajectory / QA capture hook contract. Main gateway surfaces must keep both trajectory_id assignment and QA capture middleware, and the QA middleware must still terminate in Service.CaptureFromContext so request evidence remains on by default. v3 adds the upstream-request divergence contract: the gateway must keep stashing the final (post-rewrite) upstream request body under the ops_upstream_request_body gin key, and the qa consumer must keep reading it by the identical duplicated literal.

required_file_hooks.rationale: qa capture reads this gin key by duplicated literal (qa cannot import service without an import cycle); renaming the key here silently kills upstream-request divergence capture for traj opt-in records
consumer-side duplicate of OpsUpstreamRequestBodyKey plus the CaptureFromContext hook; either disappearing silently drops request.upstream_body / upstream_divergent from opt-in blobs
pre-flight stash of the final upstream request body on the native anthropic path; an upstream merge dropping this call disables both ops_error_logs body context and traj divergence capture

Per-key conversation-record (traj) export must keep the admin-granted per-user switch (UserTrajExportEnabled -> 403). An upstream merge or refactor dropping it silently re-opens export to unauthorized users. (The former anthropic-only Platform pin was removed when the projector became multi-platform; see the projection_v2.go and engine/provider.go anchors below for the wire-shape dispatch + projectable-platform single source.)

The export authorization helper, the per-key (APIKeyIDEQ) and platform (PlatformEQ) scoping predicates, and the shape-aware streaming continuation (RequestContinues). Losing the helper drops the 403 backstop; losing a predicate silently widens a self-export beyond the UI gate; reverting RequestContinues to a messages-only predicate would mis-fold non-anthropic conversations.

The traj v2 projector dispatches reconstruction by wire shape so openai / gemini / antigravity / kiro / newapi export faithfully (not just anthropic). An upstream merge collapsing buildSessionForShape back to an anthropic-only projection silently regresses every non-anthropic key's export to empty/garbage; these case anchors make that revert fail CI.
WireShapeForRecord is the single dispatch axis keyed on (platform, inbound_endpoint). Losing a shape constant or the mapping silently drops a platform from projectable export.

Single source for the platforms whose captured wire the projector reconstructs; surfaced to the frontend export chip via /auth/me traj_export_platforms. Removing it would orphan the chip's server-driven allowlist.
